title: Aesthetics
description: Aesthetics mod for SimpleOres. Adds new decoration blocks.
body:
Adds decorative brick blocks, stairs, doors and bars based on the metals from vanilla, Simple Ores, Netherrocks, and Fusion.   
For Minecraft 1.17.1, I moved the various bricks, stairs, doors and bars back into the mods they came from and did not issue a version of this.  In the future, I may redo the vanilla Aesthetics blocks to behave more like cut copper and cut-copper derived blocks. "May" being the operative word.   For now, the 1.16.5 version is the last release of Aesthetics as an independent mod. All the non-vanilla decorative blocks are to be found in the respective mods for their raw materials.

For **Minecraft 1.16.3 and later**, Aesthetics requires both Simple Ores and SimpleCoreLib.  
For **Minecraft 1.14.4 to 1.16.1**, Aesthetics requires only Simple Ores, not SimpleCore API.  

**All the Doors and Bars**

![All the doors and bars](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/m21cDGZ3/images/525936580b6d606e038e4cfa2ee7ec6954ffc596.png)

**All the Bricks and Stairs**

![All the Bricks and Stairs](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/m21cDGZ3/images/d07b6c0ef8e37a22aaacf05220376b114c72cb7b.png)

Please see [the original Minecraft forum post](http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/minecraft-mods/1279863-simpleores-2-by-alexndrthegr8st) for more information. Or the Wiki.
